headline: C.H. Robinson’s AI Supply Chain Push Meets Supreme Court Risk Question
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NasdaqGS:CHRW) has introduced its Agentic Supply Chain platform, using multiple AI agents to automate and optimize freight and logistics workflows. The company has been highlighted by Evercore ISI as a rare AI era winner, reflecting its role as an early mover in applying AI to global logistics operations. C.H. Robinson is also involved in a U.S. Supreme Court case that could reshape how broker liability is treated at the federal versus state level. For investors...
